Canadian Oil Sector Hedges Trump Tariff Risk, US Midwest Refineries Could Be Affected
data.description: A proposed 25% tariff on Canadian imports poses a considerable risk to the American Midwest, a region heavily reliant on Canadian oil imports.

Bipartisan Lawmakers Aim To Break Up Health Care Giants With New Legislation
data.description: Pharmacy-benefit managers (PBMs) have been scrutinized for their role in drug distribution for years. Now a bipartisan group of lawmakers is threatening to break up the companies behind these so-called drug middlemen.
